name: RealityJay Immersive Art & Music by Dilu

reviews.review_description:
I installed and played this one last night.  
It felt like it was a project for a VR Dev 101 class at a local community college. 
If that were the case, I shouldn't bag on it.  I do like experimental wtf VR stuff...so I'll give it a very generous 3 stars in that case.  
I hope that whoever developed this app/game will continue down the path...because maybe after a few more years of experience, they'll create something great.

developer_response.body: Hey Wet_Blister! First of all, thanks for your time with my vr art and sharing your impression, you  are my first real reality reviewer. This is my first app indeed, less than 4 months self-taught into it. I really hope to keep improving it over the years. Keep that juicy feedback coming, I hope to take it to 5. Thanks again
